title: Fix kickoff agent key not being published after creation

comments.author: driver--fix-kickoff-agent-key-not-being-published-after-creation
comments.content: Plan: When kickoff calls agent::init with no_key=true, the new agent config has no ssh_public_key, so publish_agent_key is never called and ensure_agent_key_published also skips (no key in config). Fix: in init_worktree_agent (kickoff.rs), after creating the agent config with no_key=true, copy the parent's SSH key info into the new agent config, then call publish_agent_key to publish the parent's public key under the new agent ID.

comments.author: driver--fix-kickoff-agent-key-not-being-published-after-creation
comments.content: Decision: Fix in kickoff.rs init_worktree_agent rather than changing agent::init behavior. The no_key flag is also used by bootstrap and CLI, so changing its semantics could break other flows. Instead, kickoff should explicitly copy parent key info and publish after init.
